name: Slave
description: A laborer hardened by deprivation, toil, and survival under oppression. Skill Proficiencies: Animal Handling, Nature. Tool Proficiency: choose one Artisan's Tool. Equipment Option A: Sickle, Artisan's Tool, Healer's Kit, Iron Pot, Shovel, Traveler's Clothes, 30 CP. Equipment Option B: 50 CP.
